task_completion.description: Verify the display name is updated to 'Capt. Rodriguez | ORD'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a profile or settings screen in the Flight Crew View app showing the user's display name as exactly 'Capt. Rodriguez | ORD'.

task_completion.description: Verify the position is set to Captain
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a profile or settings screen showing the user's position or role selected as 'Captain'.

task_completion.description: Verify the home airport is configured to ORD
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a profile or settings screen showing the Home Airport field set to 'ORD'.

task_completion.description: Verify the base/activity airport is configured to ORD
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a profile or settings screen showing the Base or Activity Airport field set to 'ORD'.

task_completion.description: Verify fo.james@united.aero is added as a friend
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Friends, Network, or Contacts section of the app showing 'fo.james@united.aero' in the list of added friends or pending sent requests.

task_completion.description: Verify fa.chen@united.aero is added as a friend
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Friends, Network, or Contacts section of the app showing 'fa.chen@united.aero' in the list of added friends or pending sent requests.

task_completion.description: Verify fa.garcia@united.aero is added as a friend
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Friends, Network, or Contacts section of the app showing 'fa.garcia@united.aero' in the list of added friends or pending sent requests.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Flight Crew View application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the graphical user interface of the Flight Crew View app, not a generic text editor, browser, or notes app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show terminal windows, ADB shells, or command-line interfaces being used to modify app data directly.

integrity.description: Verify friends were added through the app's proper networking interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The email addresses should be entered into the app's specific 'Add Friend' or 'Search' input fields, rather than just typed as text on a blank screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: ORD refers to Chicago O'Hare International Airport, a verified United Airlines hub. The persona is a United Airlines Captain based at ORD. The target application is Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView).
